description: `print` of a list literal (issue #98) evaluates the whole list, including a nested list, and carries the raw value on the `print` trace event: `[1 [2 3]]` evaluates to the nested runtime list `[1, [2, 3]]`. The event carries the raw evaluated value (not pre-formatted text), matching every other effect payload — a consumer renders learner-visible text via the shared canonical-printed-form rule (`@openlogo/runtime`'s `printedForm`, unit-tested directly in `print-format.test.mjs` since bracketed list text is not itself an event-stream shape).
